zh.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Barden於大約1346年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John de Barden19歲，母親Alice Thirkell23歲。她於1368年與Henry Wyman在英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年9月22日在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Barden于大约1346年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John de Barden19岁，母亲Alice Thirkell23岁。她于1368年与Henry Wyman在英国英格兰越可爾希亞活结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年9月22日在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Barden Park in Tonbridge, Kent, or Bardown in Ticehurst, Sussex, or Berden in Essex.
English: habitational name from any of the places in North and Yorkshire named Barden, from Old English bere ‘barley’ (or the derived adjective beren) + denu ‘valley’.

variants.name: Bearden
meanings: English (London): variant of Barden , Bardon 2, or from places in Devon and Cornwall called Beardon, from Old English burh ‘manor’ + dūn ‘hill’. In the British Isles the surname is now rare.

variants.name: Bardin
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Bairdín, see Barden 4.
French: from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Bardo, from barta ‘battle axe’ (see Bard 1).

variants.name: Bardon
meanings: English: habitational name from Bardon in Leicestershire, named with Old English berg ‘hill, mound, barrow’ + dūn ‘hill’, meaning ‘barrow hill’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Bárdáin, see Barden 4.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Barden was born about 1346, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Barden, was 19 and her mother, Alice Thirkell, was 23. She married Henry Wyman in 1368, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 22 September 1403, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Barden est née environ 1346, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Barden, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Thirkell, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Wyman en 1368, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1403, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Barden um 1346 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Barden 19 und ihre Mutter Alice Thirkell 23. Sie hat 1368 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Henry Wyman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1403 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Barden è nata il circa 1346 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Barden, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice Thirkell, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Henry Wyman nel 1368, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1403, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド
ja.St Crux Churchyard, York, Yorkshire, Eng: イギリスヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bardenが約1346年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Bardenは19歳，母Alice Thirkellは23歳であった。1368年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでHenry Wymanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年9月22日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Barden(이)가 대략 1346년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Barden(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Thirkell(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Henry Wyman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 9월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Barden nasceu aproximadamente 1346, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Barden, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Thirkell, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Wyman em 1368, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1403, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Barden родилась около 1346 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Barden было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Thirkell, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Wyman в 1368 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 сентября 1403 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Barden nació aproximadamente 1346, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Barden, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice Thirkell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Henry Wyman en 1368, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1403, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
